summary: The customer had a billing issue with an $800 charge that was supposed to be covered by insurance. The agent, Sophie, resolved the issue by correcting the billing error and resubmitting the claim.
resolution: Offer additional assistance or resources to prevent similar issues in the future
issue_detected: Incorrect billing due to wrong procedure code

empathy_phrases_used: I am so sorry this has caused you worry

improvements.suggestion: Offer additional assistance or resources to prevent similar issues in the future
improvements.example: Is there anything else I can help you with today to ensure your account is up to date?

improvements.suggestion: Provide clear explanations of the billing process and how to avoid similar issues
improvements.example: To avoid similar billing errors, you can always check your account online or contact us directly if you have any questions.

highlights: The agent, Sophie, effectively empathized with the customer's concern and provided a clear resolution to the issue.
Sophie's professionalism and language clarity contributed to a positive customer experience.
